The address and phone number of Chardon are:
Etude de Maître Chardon
83 boulevard Haussmann
75008 Paris, Tel.: 00 33 1 53 43 10 00.
 
You may contact him directly but I also ask him to send you proposals for dates of meetings with him this week.
 
Best regards,
 
Matthieu de BOISSÉSON

Apparently the notary and my partners have not yet received the information and instructions they requested, in particular on the Danish company and on the deposit of ten per cent of the price. Do you still intend to sign the 15th March agreement and to acquire Guermantes?
 
Kind regards
 
Matthieu

Dear Jeffrey,

My partner Alain Maillot and I have had a further meeting with Juan Pablo Molyneux this afternoon.

We had the opportunity to discuss several issues. It seems to me that, since I shall be abroad this week, you should meet my partner Alain Maillot over the week-end, when you arrive in Paris. He is a corporate and tax lawyer and will explain to you the details of the transaction.

His e-mail address is amaillot@darroisvilley.com, his personal phone number is 06 07 97 77 34.

Kind regards,

Matthieu de BOISS�SON
